title: malope malacoides subsp. laevigata
intro: Malope malacoides subsp. laevigata, also known as smooth-fruited or smooth goosefoot, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, derived from its high content of mucilages and alkaloids. The health benefits of Malope malacoides subsp. laevigata include soothing irritated skin and mucous membranes, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and acting as a natural expectorant to aid in the removal of mucus. Malope malacoides subsp. laevigata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and poultices for topical application, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
